title: CBI Annual Report 2023
description: A comprehensive review of CBI's programs, impact, finances, and strategic direction for 2023.

title: WASH Needs Assessment: North-East Nigeria 2023
description: Findings from CBI's field-level assessment of water, sanitation, and hygiene conditions across 8 LGAs in Borno and Adamawa states.

title: Nutrition Situation Analysis: Yobe State 2023
description: A situational analysis of acute malnutrition prevalence and response capacity in Yobe State.

title: Education in Emergency: Lessons from Borno
description: Documenting key lessons and promising practices from CBI's education programs in conflict-affected communities.

title: CBI Strategic Plan 2023–2026
description: CBI's three-year strategic framework outlining vision, mission, programmatic priorities, and resource mobilization goals.
